title: Fixing Broken Image Tags with Missing 'alt' Attributes

statement.markdown: Given a list of HTML strings representing image tags, your task is to validate these tags by checking if they have a valid 'alt' attribute. If a tag is invalid, return a string indicating the error message. Otherwise, return the original tag.
statement.outputFormat: Validated HTML string or error message
statement.notes: Assume the input tags are well-formed HTML and only contain image tags ()

constraints.description: Number of image tags to validate

examples.explanation: Valid image tag with no 'alt' attribute

examples.output: Error: Image tag without 'alt' attribute at index 2
examples.explanation: Invalid image tag with missing 'alt' attribute

hints.text: Check if the 'alt' attribute is present in the image tag

editorial.title: Validating Image Tags with 'alt' Attributes
editorial.intuition: Iterate over the list of image tags and check if each tag has a valid 'alt' attribute
editorial.bruteForce: Check each tag individually using regular expressions
editorial.betterSolution: Use a HTML parser to extract the 'alt' attribute
editorial.optimalSolution: Use a HTML parser to extract the 'alt' attribute and return an error message if it's missing
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: Check the correctness of the solution
commonMistakes: Forgetting to check for null values

testCases.output: Error: Image tag without 'alt' attribute
